warm_up:
Warm-up
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

metcon.name: Mayhem Workout 4 (for normal humans)
metcon.description:
4 RFT
Work 2:30 - Rest 1 Min
15/12 Cal Row
15 Abmat Sit Ups
Accumulate T2B in remaining time until you reach 70 T2B
Last round work until 3:30
Rx+ 20/15 Cal Row & 20 Sit Ups

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain imbalances from snatch/OHS dominance and row fatigue without compromising recovery.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Power Snatch, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Strength: Overhead Squat, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Metcon: Mayhem Workout 4 (for normal humans). Rounds for Time: 15/12 Cal Row, 15 Abmat Sit Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, back (lats), hamstrings.
